author: onozaty
message:
Merge pull request #136 from onozaty/add-redmine-4.0-ci

feat: add redmine-4.1 CI job

author: onozaty
message:
fix: replace redmine-4.0 with redmine-4.1 job

Redmine 4.0.9's issue fixture (issues.yml) doesn't set estimated_hours
on the fixture issue with id 1, which the plugin's tests assume (added
upstream in 4.1.7), causing an unrelated test failure. Track 4.1
instead, and broaden the loofah pin to also cover nokogiri ~> 1.11.1
(Redmine 4.1's pinned version under Ruby 2.6), which likewise predates
Nokogiri::HTML4.

author: onozaty
message:
fix: pin loofah for redmine-4.0 job

Redmine 4.0.9 pins nokogiri to ~> 1.10.0, but loofah >= 2.21
requires Nokogiri::HTML4, which that version doesn't provide,
breaking rake tasks with a NameError.

Merge pull request #135 from onozaty/fix-circleci-bundler

author: onozaty
message:
fix: use sudo when downgrading RubyGems

cimg/ruby images run as a non-root user, so gem update --system
needs sudo to write to the system Ruby install.

author: onozaty
message:
fix: remove unneeded minitest pin, downgrade RubyGems for redmine-6.1

- Redmine 5.1.13 already pins minitest to '< 6.0' in its own Gemfile,
  so our own pin caused a duplicate-gem Bundler error. Remove it.
- redmine-6.1 depends on commonmarker ~> 2.3, which requires
  RubyGems ~> 3.4. CircleCI's ruby:3.2 image ships a newer RubyGems
  that can't satisfy this, so downgrade it before bundle install.

author: onozaty
message:
feat: add redmine-6.0 and redmine-6.1 CI jobs, track latest patch versions

- Add CI jobs for Redmine 6.0 and 6.1, which were previously untested
  (latest already covers 7.0)
- Switch pinned patch versions (5.1.6, 5.0.11, 4.2.10) to minor-only
  version specs so CI tracks the latest patch release automatically

author: onozaty
message:
fix: pin minitest to 5.x only for redmine-5.1.6 job

minitest 6 removes APIs that Rails 6.1's line_filtering still
relies on, breaking test runs for redmine-5.1.6 when bundler
resolves the newest minitest release. Other jobs already resolve
to minitest 5.x or 6.x compatible versions, so scope the pin to
the affected job only.

author: onozaty
message:
fix: upgrade redmine-plugin orb to fix CI failure with Bundler 4

bundle install used the removed --path flag, which broke jobs
running on newer Ruby/Bundler versions.

author: onozaty
message:
chore: update DevContainer configuration

- Add GitHub CLI feature
- Pin postgres image to version 17 instead of latest

author: MAEDA Go
message:
Avoid Redmine 7.0 ActiveSupport::Configurable deprecation warning

Replace activerecord-compatible_legacy_migration with explicit
ActiveRecord::Migration[4.2] inheritance in plugin migrations. This removes
the compatibility helper and means the plugin no longer remains compatible
with Redmine 3.x.

Update the documented compatibility range and require Redmine 4.0 or later.

message:
Merge pull request #129 from hidakatsuya/remove-unnecessary-styles

Remove unnecessary icon styles

author: Katsuya HIDAKA
message:
Remove unnecessary icon styles

These icon styles do not need to be defined in the plugin because
identical styles are already defined in Redmine itself, at least up to
version 6.1. Defining them globally in the plugin could even cause
unexpected UI issues. Removing these styles still allows icons (PNG or
SVG) to display correctly from Redmine 5.1 through trunk.

Merge pull request #128 from hidakatsuya/svg-icon

Replace PNG icons with SVG for future Redmine compatibility

author: Katsuya HIDAKA
message:
Replace PNG icons with SVG for future Redmine compatibility

Redmine switched to SVG icons in version 6.0. This change updates the
plugin icons accordingly while keeping PNG support for older Redmine
versions.
